_metadata.description: NEPA EIS timeline benchmarks from CEQ EIS Timeline Reports (2025), compiled by Thomas Hochman / Foundation for American Innovation
_metadata.primary_data: CEQ EIS Timeline Reports (2025) — completed EISs with FEIS published 2010-2024
_metadata.source_type: tier-4 (advocacy organization) using tier-1 government data (CEQ, EPA)
known_gaps: Only 2 FERC pipeline EISs in completed dataset (Ruby Pipeline, Apex Expansion) — small sample
Most current proposed pipeline/transmission projects have not yet completed EIS
Court challenge data (350+ lawsuits) not yet integrated
Duration = NOI-to-ROD in years; projects without ROD excluded from duration calculations

energy_fossil.description: Energy Fossil category (pipelines, gas development, coal leases, fossil generation)

energy_renewable.description: Energy Renewable category (hydro relicensing, wind, solar, transmission for renewables)

ferc_pipeline.note: [GAP] Only 2 completed FERC pipeline EISs in dataset. Most FERC pipeline reviews use EA (Environmental Assessment), not EIS. EIS sample too small for reliable benchmarking.

benchmarks.statutory_note: FAST-41 and Fiscal Responsibility Act set 2-year NOI-to-ROD target for EIS reviews

nepa_status_definitions.no_eis_required: Project processed via EA/FONSI or categorically excluded — no EIS needed
nepa_status_definitions.pre_noi: Project announced but Notice of Intent not yet published in Federal Register
nepa_status_definitions.noi_published: NOI published — scoping and public comment phase
nepa_status_definitions.deis_published: Draft EIS published — public review (45-day minimum comment period)
nepa_status_definitions.feis_published: Final EIS published — 30-day waiting period before ROD
nepa_status_definitions.rod_issued: Record of Decision issued — NEPA review complete
nepa_status_definitions.ea_fonsi: Environmental Assessment resulted in Finding of No Significant Impact
nepa_status_definitions.supplemental_eis: Supplemental EIS required (changed conditions, court order, or new information)
nepa_status_definitions.categorical_exclusion: Action qualifies for categorical exclusion from NEPA review
